ddls:
CREATE TABLE "options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the option */,
  "setting" TEXT /* Current setting of the option */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the option */,
  "category" INTEGER /* Category of the option */,
  "short_desc" TEXT /* Short description of the option */,
  "extra_desc" TEXT /* Extra description of the option */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context in which the option is used */,
  "vartype" INTEGER /* Data type of the option */,
  "source" INTEGER /* Source of the option */,
  "min_val" REAL /* Minimum value of the option */,
  "max_val" REAL /* Maximum value of the option */,
  "enumvals" TEXT /* Enumerated values for the option */,
  "boot_val" TEXT /* Boot value of the option */,
  "reset_val" TEXT /* Reset value of the option */,
  "sourcefile" TEXT /* Source file of the option */,
  "sourceline" INTEGER /* Source line number of the option */,
  "pending_restart" INTEGER /* Whether a restart is pending for the option */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database instance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the option was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the option was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the option */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the option */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Whether the option is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_options_vartype FOREIGN KEY ("vartype") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_options_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_options_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_options_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_options_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data type was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the data type */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the source */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "option_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the option */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the option */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the value */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_option_values_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_option_values_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_option_values_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "option_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the option */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the option */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the option */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database instance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_option_history_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_option_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Whether the user is an admin */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the option being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the option */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the option was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database instance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
